rulings.Case Title: JYOTHSNA TALKAD ET AL VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Contest Good Faith Settlement Application
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Apr 01, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT DIPALI SHAH's Motion To Contest Good Faith Settlement Application continued to May 22, 2020. Trial is continued to July 20, 2020 per March 24, 2020 Order of the Presiding judge. If parties stipulate to a different hearing date after May 22, 2020 parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on March 27, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. = (501/CFH)
